creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Please add libuuid.so.1 to the CentOS 6 base package. Fedora 10 base had it, and this fixes at least www/linux-f10-flashplugin11.
	It's also less astonishing to people replacing the Fedora 10 base. This patch also fixes the comment to reflect the package version.

How-To-Repeat: 	1) install emulators/linux_base-c6
	2) install www/nspluginwrapper
	3) install www/linux-f10-flashplugin11
	4) run "nspluginwrapper -v -a -i"
